summary: Keyword, Plan, and Approve workflows use Mantine/shared primitives, preserve their data flow, and build cleanly.

checks.name: CHECK-01: KeywordPage migrated to Mantine inputs
checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; t=Path('frontend/src/pages/KeywordPage.tsx').read_text(); print('TextInput' in t and 'Textarea' in t and 'className=\"text-input\"' not in t)"

checks.name: CHECK-02: PlanPage uses StatusBadge and Paper
checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; t=Path('frontend/src/pages/PlanPage.tsx').read_text(); print('StatusBadge' in t and 'Paper' in t and 'plan-step' not in t)"

checks.name: CHECK-03: ApprovePage uses Checkbox and ActionBar
checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; t=Path('frontend/src/pages/ApprovePage.tsx').read_text(); print('Checkbox' in t and 'ActionBar' in t and 'approve-item' not in t)"

checks.name: CHECK-04: API/state contracts preserved
checks.actual: Original fetchJson usage and prop contracts remain present in all three pages.

checks.name: CHECK-05: Frontend build passes
checks.actual: Build succeeded after workflow migration A and at final verification.
